LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT ST. LUKE'S HOSPITAL'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, SUBMITTED ON AUG-16-2007 BY PATRICK J. MAHONEY. ARGUED AND THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. RULINGS ON DEFENDANT'S EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS ARE AS FOLLOWS: BASED ON STIPULATION OF COUNSEL, COURT STRIKES PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL'S DECLARATION RE ARGUMENT. EXHIBITS ARE ADMITTED. OBJECTION #6 IS OVERRULED. OBJECTION #7 - EXHIBIT #8 IS ADMITTED. PARAGRAPH 9 OF THE JOHNSON DECLARATION IS STRICKEN. OBJECTION #8 IS SUSTAINED. OBJECTION #13 IS SUSTAINED. COURT TAKES UNDER SUBMISSION THE OBJECTION TO THE DECLARATION OF ALLISON WEST. COURT WILL ALLOW MS. BOHBOT TO SUBMIT A SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION ON THE WEST DECLARATION BY AUGUST 20, 2007. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
